title: Spack stack package set (v1)
description: A named list of root specs grouped by purpose. Referenced from stack.yaml.builds[*].package_set. Mirrors docs/spack_stack_generation_design_v6.md § Package Sets.

schema_version.description: Package-set schema version. v1 is this file.

name.description: Set name. Must match the filename stem (e.g., a file named science-full.yaml has name: science-full).

tier.description: Tier guard. canonical = production; smoke = CI; experimental = transient. A stack.yaml build referencing a smoke set fails render-time validation unless explicitly opted in.

description.description: Human-readable purpose. Required so maintainers can identify the set at a glance.

kinds.description: Package-set kinds this set can satisfy. Open vocabulary; the contract resolver matches these against build_classes[*].package_set_kind. CSE uses serial/mpi/gpu/core.

specs.description: Root specs by package-set kind. Keys are either 'any' (specs identical across every kind) or a kind name appearing in `kinds`. Values are arrays of Spack spec strings.

provenance_hints.description: Optional overrides for the render-step provenance derivation. Keys are package names; values are provenance classes.
